3449648947.title: Dry Bag Waterproof for Women Men,2/5/10/15/20/30L Outdoor Sports Bag for Swimming Boating Kayaking Rafting River Trekking
3449648947.detail_text: Dry Bag Waterproof for Women Men,2/5/10/15/20/30L Outdoor Sports Bag for Swimming Boating Kayaking Rafting River Trekking Description ▲Waterproof dry bag, a must have for camping, fishing, festivals, beaches, hiking, canoeing, backpacking etc. Keep your items inside perfect and dry. ▲Can store many things and keep them dry, such as clothing, maps, books, cameras, electrical equipment and other items. ▲Protect your items from dust, water, snow, rain, and all kinds of damage, just enjoy the outdoor life freely. ▲Ultra lightweight and super water resistance. Incredibly durable with lightweight material. ▲Easy to wash and durable to use. Buckle to make you feel secure, and make it convenient to open or close it. Specification: ●Material: PVC. ●Waterproof rating: IPX6. ●Size: 2L single shoulder: 11.5 * 28cm 5L single shoulder: 19 * 40cm 10L single shoulder: 19 * 55cm 15L backpack: 23 * 57cm 20L backpack: 23 * 63cm 30L backpack: 24 * 72cm Package include: 1 * Portable Swimming Bag Note: There might be a bit color distortions due to different computer resolutions. There might be size errors due to different computer resolutions.
3449648947.detail_html:
Dry Bag Waterproof for Women Men,2/5/10/15/20/30L Outdoor Sports Bag for Swimming Boating Kayaking Rafting River Trekking

Description
▲Waterproof dry bag, a must have for camping, fishing, festivals, beaches, hiking, canoeing, backpacking etc. Keep your items inside perfect and dry.
▲Can store many things and keep them dry, such as clothing, maps, books, cameras, electrical equipment and other items.
▲Protect your items from dust, water, snow, rain, and all kinds of damage, just enjoy the outdoor life freely.
▲Ultra lightweight and super water resistance. Incredibly durable with lightweight material.
▲Easy to wash and durable to use. Buckle to make you feel secure, and make it convenient to open or close it.

Specification:
●Material: PVC.
●Waterproof rating: IPX6.
●Size:
2L single shoulder: 11.5 * 28cm
5L single shoulder: 19 * 40cm
10L single shoulder: 19 * 55cm
15L backpack: 23 * 57cm
20L backpack: 23 * 63cm
30L backpack: 24 * 72cm

Package include:
1 * Portable Swimming Bag

Note:
There might be a bit color distortions due to different computer resolutions.
There might be size errors due to different computer resolutions.

aiTexts: This waterproof dry bag is designed for outdoor water sports like swimming, boating, kayaking, rafting, and trekking.
Made from durable, ultra-lightweight PVC material with an IPX6 waterproof rating to keep items dry from water, dust, snow, and rain.
Available in multiple sizes (2L to 30L) to store clothes, electronics, maps, and other essentials safely.
Features a secure buckle closure for easy open and close, providing convenience and reliability on the go.
Easy to wash and highly durable, perfect for camping, hiking, fishing, and other outdoor adventures.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc:
Dry Bag Waterproof for Women Men,2/5/10/15/20/30L Outdoor Sports Bag for Swimming Boating Kayaking Rafting River Trekking

Description
▲Waterproof dry bag, a must have for camping, fishing, festivals, beaches, hiking, canoeing, backpacking etc. Keep your items inside perfect and dry.
▲Can store many things and keep them dry, such as clothing, maps, books, cameras, electrical equipment and other items.
▲Protect your items from dust, water, snow, rain, and all kinds of damage, just enjoy the outdoor life freely.
▲Ultra lightweight and super water resistance. Incredibly durable with lightweight material.
▲Easy to wash and durable to use. Buckle to make you feel secure, and make it convenient to open or close it.

Specification:
●Material: PVC.
●Waterproof rating: IPX6.
●Size:

This bag is ideal for sport and outdoor activities as it gives you extra space to carry in your shoes or any other items that you might need on the go. 1859211986.detail_html:
Brand: Lifewerkz

Perfect for excursions, camping and travel. The bag is made of durable high quality PVC tarpaulin. Its smooth surface is easy to clean and can float on water. This bag is ideal for sport and outdoor activities as it gives you extra space to carry in your shoes or any other items that you might need on the go.

Specifications

  • Follows Us to get a voucher for additional 10% off (no minimum spend) - https://www.lazada.sg/shop/i/landing_page/voucher?sellerId=1139580143&voucherId=91471121037033&wh_weex=true
  • Color: Blue, Black, Red or Yellow
  • Material: PVC Tarpaulin
  • Size: 20L – 57cm x 25cm and 5L – 38cm x 20cm
  • Comes with sling

Features:

  • Ready stocks available
  • Made of durable high quality PVC Tarpaulin
  • Waterproof which makes it perfect for outdoor activities such as diving, kayaking, canoeing, sailing, fishing, surfing, rafting, hiking, camping and other water activities
  • Bag can float on water when rolled and buckled
  • Smooth surface of dry bags makes it easy to clean

Benefits:

  • Keeps your belongings dry
  • Protects against water damage
  • Ideal for outdoor activities
  • Protects against dust and dirt
  • Provides ample storage space

product.desc:
Features

100% waterproof, keep your items inside perfect and dry.

Durable and firm buckle.

Portable ideal for Biker/Backpack/Boating/Swimming/Beach fishing sports gym Camping/River rafting/Boating/Sailing, hiking, cycling.

Specifications:

Item type: Waterproof bag

Main material: High strength fabric

Color : Black/Yellow/Orange/Blue

Capacity: 5L / 10L / 15L / 20L / 30L

5L, 10L & 15L Have single strap.

20L & 30L Have double strap.

Measurements

5L: 30 cm width x 41 cm height

10L: 30 cm width x 55 cm height

15L: 35 cm width x 55 cm height

20L: 38 cm width x 60 cm height

30L: 40 cm width x 65 cm height

5L 10L 15L 20L 30L Swimming PVC Pack Dry Bag Outdoor Sports Waterproof Shoulder Bags for Trekking Drifting Rafting Surfing Pool Beach  Kayak Boating Pack Backpack

【Material】: PVC
【Size】
5L(single shoulder strap):tile size:
19*40cm,weight: 200g

19*55cm,weight: 230g
15L(single shoulder strap):tile size: 23.5*55cm,weight: 310g
20L(double shoulder strap):tile size: 23.5*60cm,weight: 360g
30L(double shoulder strap):tile size: 26*70cm,weight: 400g


Using:

Dry Bag for Kayaking, Beach, Rafting, Boating, Hiking, Camping and Fishing.

Never worry about dropping it in water or water getting in. Dry Bag can be used as a fishing tackle bag or travel bag.

Dry Bag - waterproof, snow proof, sand proof, dustproof. Forge rivers, go kayak fishing, canoe
【Feature】: Leisure Fashion, Durable,Waterproof, Waterproof,detachable shoulder strap,top rolling
【Application】: Trekking Drifting Rafting Surfing Boating

2.Due to the difference between different monitors and lighting effects, the actual color of the item may be slightly different from the color shown on the picture.

product.desc:
5L 10L 15L 20L 30L Swimming PVC Pack Dry Bag Outdoor Sports Waterproof Shoulder Bags for Trekking Drifting Rafting Surfing Pool Beach  Kayak Boating Pack Backpack

【Material】: PVC
【Size】
5L(single shoulder strap):tile size:
19*40cm,weight: 200g
10L(single shoulder strap):tile size:
19*55cm,weight: 230g
15L(single shoulder strap):tile size: 23.5*55cm,weight: 310g
20L(double shoulder strap):tile size: 23.5*60cm,weight: 360g
30L(double shoulder strap):tile size: 26*70cm,weight: 400g


Using:

Dry Bag for Kayaking, Beach, Rafting, Boating, Hiking, Camping and Fishing.

Never worry about dropping it in water or water getting in. Dry Bag can be used as a fishing tackle bag or travel bag.

Dry Bag - waterproof, snow proof, sand proof, dustproof. Forge rivers, go kayak fishing, canoe
【Feature】: Leisure Fashion, Durable,Waterproof, Waterproof,detachable shoulder strap,top rolling
【Application】: Trekking Drifting Rafting Surfing Boating
Note:
1.Manual measuring, please allow slightly measurement error.
2.Due to the difference between different monitors and lighting effects, the actual color of the item may be slightly different from the color shown on the picture.

3449104173.title: 🇸🇬 Ocean Pack Dry Bag [SG Ready Stock] Waterproof Backpack Water Proof Dry Sack for Kayaking Hiking Camping Fishing Boating
3449104173.detail_text: 🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈 ▶ Waterproof Dry Bag 10L 🔎Material: Environmental toughest non-rip 500D PVC material our bags provide the best durability on the market, while still maintaining their lightweight and flexibility. 🔎Shoulder Strap: with removable shoulder strap for easy carry and transport. 🔎Lightweight Compact and Durable: Offers protection for everything from river running to motorcycle touring. 🔎Secured Waterproof: Provides waterproof protection for your phones, camera, clothes, and documents from water, sand, dust and dirt. 🔎Perfect Size: 10L is the mostly used size. 🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈 ▶ Waterproof Phone Pouch 👍 Large Universal Size ➽➽ Extra large size, up to 7.5" inches capacity, fits almost all smartphones. Compatible with: iPhone Pro Max series, Galaxy S Ultra series, Xiaomi Ultra series, OPPO Find X Pro series, etc. Also can easily put in your ID, cash, credit cards, and passport. 👍 Super Sealability,100% Waterproof ➽➽ It has double zippers and double velcro closures. Just fully close the 2 zipper locks and roll down 3 times, then stick the two velcros firmly, easy and safe. 👍 IPX8 Level Waterproof ➽➽ It can protect your cell phone underwater 30 meters. It is specially designed for outdoor activities such as pools, beaches, fishing, swimming, sailing, skiing, boating, kayaking, snorkeling, tubing, rafting, showering, sauna and other water park activities, keep your device away from water and dust, or even taking a shower with your phone in hand. 👍 Sensitive Touchscreen Window ➽➽ Made of upgraded TPU material that provides excellent response sensitivity. You can easily operate your cell phone on the touchscreen window, allowing you to text and browse messages without taking out your phone. 👍 Clear Picture Underwater-Cruise Ship Essentials ➽➽ With high transmittance transparency technology, this phone pouch provides a crystal clear photo capture of the underwater world. 👍 Adjustable skin-friendly lanyard ➽➽ Adjustable length lanyard with buckle, that fits you better.
3449104173.detail_html:
🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈

▶ Waterproof Dry Bag 10L

🔎Material: Environmental toughest non-rip 500D PVC material our bags provide the best durability on the market, while still maintaining their lightweight and flexibility.

🔎Shoulder Strap: with removable shoulder strap for easy carry and transport.

🔎Lightweight Compact and Durable: Offers protection for everything from river running to motorcycle touring.

🔎Secured Waterproof: Provides waterproof protection for your phones, camera, clothes, and documents from water, sand, dust and dirt.

🔎Perfect Size: 10L is the mostly used size.

🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈

👍 Super Sealability,100% Waterproof ➽➽ It has double zippers and double velcro closures. Just fully close the 2 zipper locks and roll down 3 times, then stick the two velcros firmly, easy and safe.

👍 IPX8 Level Waterproof ➽➽ It can protect your cell phone underwater 30 meters. It is specially designed for outdoor activities such as pools, beaches, fishing, swimming, sailing, skiing, boating, kayaking, snorkeling, tubing, rafting, showering, sauna and other water park activities, keep your device away from water and dust, or even taking a shower with your phone in hand.

👍 Sensitive Touchscreen Window ➽➽ Made of upgraded TPU material that provides excellent response sensitivity. You can easily operate your cell phone on the touchscreen window, allowing you to text and browse messages without taking out your phone.

👍 Clear Picture Underwater-Cruise Ship Essentials ➽➽ With high transmittance transparency technology, this phone pouch provides a crystal clear photo capture of the underwater world.

👍 Adjustable skin-friendly lanyard ➽➽ Adjustable length lanyard with buckle, that fits you better.

page_json.description: ✅Singapore Seller / Local Ready Stock / Fast Delivery ▷You will get more discount if order 2 items and more ★Don't forget to collect ► Free Shipping Voucher :) 🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈▶ Waterproof Dry Bag 10L🔎Material: Environmental toughest non-rip 500D PVC material our bags provide the best durability on the market, while still maintaining their lightweight and flexibility.🔎Shoulder Strap: with removable shoulder strap for easy carry and transport.🔎Lightweight Compact and Durable: Offers protection for everything from river running to motorcycle touring.🔎Secured Waterproof: Provides waterproof protection for your phones, camera, clothes, and documents from water, sand, dust and dirt.🔎Perfect Size: 10L is the mostly used size.🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈🌈▶ Waterproof Phone Pouch👍 Large Universal Size ➽➽ Extra large size, up to 7.5" inches capacity, fits almost all smartphones. Compatible with: iPhone Pro Max series, Galaxy S Ultra series, Xiaomi Ultra series, OPPO Find X Pro series, etc. Also can easily put in your ID, cash, credit cards, and passport.👍 Super Sealability,100% Waterproof ➽➽ It has double zippers and double velcro closures. Just fully close the 2 zipper locks and roll down 3 times, then stick the two velcros firmly, easy and safe.👍 IPX8 Level Waterproof ➽➽ It can protect your cell phone underwater 30 meters. It is specially designed for outdoor activities such as pools, beaches, fishing, swimming, sailing, skiing, boating, kayaking, snorkeling, tubing, rafting, showering, sauna and other water park activities, keep your device away from water and dust, or even taking a shower with your phone in hand.👍 Sensitive Touchscreen Window ➽➽ Made of upgraded TPU material that provides excellent response sensitivity. You can easily operate your cell phone on the touchscreen window, allowing you to text and browse messages without taking out your phone.👍 Clear Picture Underwater-Cruise Ship Essentials ➽➽ With high transmittance transparency technology, this phone pouch provides a crystal clear photo capture of the underwater world.👍 Adjustable skin-friendly lanyard ➽➽ Adjustable length lanyard with buckle, that fits you better.

3424830383.detail_text: Waterproof PVC Dry Bag for Women Men 2L/5L/10L/15L/20L/30L Outdoor Sport Storage Bag for Kayaking, Boating, Fishing, Swimming Descriptions: Made of stiff PVC with fully welded seams effectively protect your electric device, clothes, snacks and other items from water, sand and dirt during river trekking, boating,rafting, kayaking and beach leisure. Have a nice day with such a wonderful dry bag~ Features: 1.KEEP STUFF DRY: Protect your clothes, towels, electric device, snack, wallets from water and dirt. 2.LEAKAGE PROOF: Waterproof PVC fabric with fully welded seams, no worry about getting wet, just go to play water sports. 3.CONVENIENT: Roll-top closure for easy operate and detachable strap for convenient carry. 4.DESIGNED FOR SPORTS: Wonderful waterproof bag for boating, river trekking, rafting and kayaking. aiTexts: This waterproof dry bag is designed for outdoor water sports enthusiasts engaging in kayaking, boating, fishing, swimming, and rafting.
Made from durable waterproof PVC with fully welded seams, it ensures your belongings like electronics, clothes, and snacks stay dry and protected from water, sand, and dirt.
The roll-top closure offers a secure seal, while the detachable shoulder strap provides easy and comfortable carrying options.
Available in multiple sizes from 2L to 30L, it suits various storage needs and preferences.
Its vibrant color options add visibility and style during any water adventure.
aiDescription.aiTip: AI-generated content for reference purposes only.

product.desc:
Waterproof PVC Dry Bag for Women Men 2L/5L/10L/15L/20L/30L Outdoor Sport Storage Bag for Kayaking, Boating, Fishing, Swimming

Descriptions:
Made of stiff PVC with fully welded seams effectively protect your electric device, clothes, snacks and other items from water, sand and dirt during river trekking, boating,rafting, kayaking and beach leisure. Have a nice day with such a wonderful dry bag~

Features:
1.KEEP STUFF DRY: Protect your clothes, towels, electric device, snack, wallets from water and dirt.
2.LEAKAGE PROOF: Waterproof PVC fabric with fully welded seams, no worry about getting wet, just go to play water sports.
3.CONVENIENT: Roll-top closure for easy operate and detachable strap for convenient carry.
4.DESIGNED FOR SPORTS: Wonderful waterproof bag for boating, river trekking, rafting and kayaking.

Specification:
Color: Black / Orange / Yellow / Pink /Green/Sky Blue/Dark Blue(optional)
Material: Waterproof PVC

Size:
Capacity: 2L
Shoulder strap: no shoulder strap
Use Size: 110mm diameter/220mm height
Flat size: width 175mm/height 285mm

Capacity: 3L
Shoulder strap: single shoulder
Use Size: Diameter 150mm/Height 220mm
Flat size: width 235mm/height 310mm

3516530546.title: Outdoor Waterproof Dry Bag River Trekking Floating Roll-top Backpack Drifting Swimming Water Sports Dry Bag 10L / 15L / 20L
3516530546.detail_text: Specification: Made of superior TPU, coated inside and welded seams to seal out water which effectively protect your electric device, clothes, snacks and other items from water, sand and dirt during river trekking, boating, rafting, kayaking and beach leisure. Features: Coated inside and welded seams, sealing out water to protect your items. 600D TPU technical fabric, reliable and wear resistant to provide a long time lasting conservation of your stuff. Sealed the bag and leave it on the water to do other water sports, no worry about the items getting wet. Roll top closure, easy operation and with a handle for convenient carry. Protect your stuff from water, sand and dust during river trekking, drifting, swimming and beach leisure. Specifications: Material: 600D TPU Capacity: 10L / 15L / 20L (optiuonal) Flat size: 10L: 55 * 25cm / 21.6 * 9.8in 15L: 60 * 35cm / 23.6 * 13.7in 20L: 67 * 41cm / 26.3 * 16.1in Use size: 10L: 30 * 19 cm / 11.8 * 7.4in 15L: 42 * 23cm / 16.5 * 9.0in 20L: 46 * 32 * 14cm / 18.1 * 12.5 * 5.5in Weight: 220-730g / 0.4-1.6lb Package weight: 230-745g / 0.5-1.6lb Package List: 1 * Waterproof Dry Bag Package List: 1 * Waterproof Dry Bag : :
3516530546.detail_html:
Specification:

Made of superior TPU, coated inside and welded seams to seal out water which effectively protect your electric device, clothes, snacks and other items from water, sand and dirt during river trekking, boating, rafting, kayaking and beach leisure. 
Features:
Coated inside and welded seams, sealing out water to protect your items.
600D TPU technical fabric, reliable and  wear resistant to provide a long time lasting conservation of your stuff.
Sealed the bag and leave it on the water to do other water sports, no worry about the items getting wet.
Roll top closure, easy operation and with a handle for convenient carry.
Protect your stuff from water, sand and dust during river trekking, drifting, swimming and beach leisure.
Specifications:
Material: 600D TPU
Capacity: 10L / 15L / 20L (optiuonal)

10L: 55 * 25cm / 21.6 * 9.8in

20L: 67 * 41cm / 26.3 * 16.1in

20L: 46 * 32 * 14cm / 18.1 * 12.5 * 5.5in 
 
Weight: 220-730g / 0.4-1.6lb
Package weight: 230-745g / 0.5-1.6lb

1 * Waterproof Dry Bag

page_json.name: OverBoard Waterproof Dry Pouch - 1 Litre
page_json.description: Overboard Nylon Unisex. Waterproof Bag for Swimming: Kayaking, snowboarding, surfing, and fishing. Outdoor Waterproof Backpack: The overboard dry bag is designed to keep your gear safe and dry. Water Bottle Holder Bag: Fits snugly to your water and keeps your gear dry. Shoulder Pad for Bag: Overboard dry bag sits comfortably on your shoulder. Adjustable straps. Skateboard Carry Bag: Perfect for protecting your boards or longboards. Dimensions: 32" x 33" x 16. Weatherproof Pouch-Class 2: IP65. Protects contents from dirt, sand and dust. Durable, wipe clean and easy to store away. Stitched and taped seams. Not suitable for full submersion. Not suitable for electronics

product.desc:
Features

Professional waterproof design. High quality, it can protect from being scraped. Humanized design, it can be used as lifebelt in emergency. It can put food, clothes, wallet and other personal belongings. It can be compressed, it is convenient to carry. Suitable for camping, drifting, hiking and other outdoor activities.

Specifications

Color: Black,Orange,Blue,Purple,Pea green,Light Green

Material: Terylene

Capacity: 4L, 10L, 20L, 40L, 70L

Weight: 25~140g

Size: 4L(22x15cm), 10L(40x34cm), 20L(47x40cm), 40L(62x54cm), 70L(70x63cm)

Package list

1 X Waterproof dry bag(Rafting Bag)

page_json.name: Outdoor Waterproof Bag Dry Bag Sack Waterproof Floating Dry Gear Bags
page_json.description: KKN Nylon. Features. Professional waterproof design. High quality, it can protect from being scraped. Humanized design, it can be used as lifebelt in emergency. It can put food, clothes, wallet and other personal belongings. It can be compressed, it is convenient to carry. Suitable for camping, drifting, hiking and other outdoor activities. Specifications. Color: Black, Orange, Blue, Purple, Pea green, Light Green. Material: Terylene. Capacity: 4L, 10L, 20L, 40L, 70L. Weight: 25~140g. Size: 4L(22x15cm), 10L(40x34cm), 20L(47x40cm), 40L(62x54cm), 70L(70x63cm). Package list. 1 X Waterproof dry bag(Rafting Bag
